structure.name: app/main.py
structure.content: import typer;from typing import Annotated;app = typer.Typer();@app.command()def main(name: Annotated[str, typer.Argument(help='The name of the person to greet', show_default=False)] = 'User'): """CLI application demonstrating ArgumentInfo usage via typer.Argument.""" typer.echo(f'Hello {name}');if __name__ == '__main__': app()

structure.name: README.md
structure.content: # Typer ArgumentInfo Project; This project illustrates how Typer handles argument metadata using the ArgumentInfo model internally when defining CLI parameters.

structure.name: tests/test_cli.py
structure.content: from typer.testing import CliRunner;from app.main import app;runner = CliRunner();def test_app(): result = runner.invoke(app, ['Alice']); assert result.exit_code == 0; assert 'Hello Alice' in result.stdout
